description: Tools for automated code review, static analysis, linting, and code coverage tracking.

entries.name: CodeRabbit
entries.summary: AI-powered code review tool integrating with GitHub/GitLab to leave contextual review comments on PRs automatically.
entries.freeTier: 200 files/hour, 3 reviews/hour, 50 conversations/hour; free forever for open source.

entries.name: Codacy
entries.summary: Automated code review covering style, security, duplication, and complexity across 40+ languages.
entries.freeTier: Free for unlimited public and private repositories on the open-source plan.

entries.name: CodeFactor
entries.summary: Automated code review for Git repos with quality grading and trend tracking.
entries.freeTier: Unlimited users and public repos free, plus one private repo.

entries.name: Codecov
entries.summary: Code coverage reporting and visualization, integrates with CI to show coverage diffs on PRs.
entries.freeTier: Free for open source; one free private repo.

entries.name: SonarCloud
entries.summary: Cloud-hosted static analysis for bugs, vulnerabilities, and code smells, from the makers of SonarQube.
entries.freeTier: Free for public/open-source projects with unlimited lines of code.
entries.paidFrom: Private repo pricing based on lines of code analyzed.

entries.name: DeepSource
entries.summary: Continuous static analysis covering bug risk, performance, security, and anti-patterns, with autofix suggestions.

entries.name: Snyk
entries.summary: Developer-first security platform scanning for vulnerabilities in code, open-source dependencies, containers, and IaC.
entries.freeTier: Free tier with limited monthly tests across code/open-source/container scanning.

entries.name: Dependabot
entries.summary: Automated dependency update PRs built into GitHub, covering most major package ecosystems.
entries.freeTier: Completely free for all public and private GitHub repos.

entries.name: Codeac.io
entries.summary: Automated Infrastructure-as-Code review integrating with GitHub, Bitbucket, and self-hosted GitLab.
entries.paidFrom: Paid plans scale with repo count.

entries.name: Better Code Hub
entries.summary: Automated code maintainability checks based on the Software Improvement Group's 10 guidelines.
